claim.observation: Trusted cloud receipt hunt summary records a redacted cloud-name artifact inventory of 97 rows. In the PC User profile, named browser/provider surfaces include Chrome Drive IndexedDB=11, Chrome Docs IndexedDB=8, Chrome Drive localstorage=2, Chrome Dropbox localstorage=2, Recent LNK cloud-name rows=3, and an iCloud-named OST row=1. Selected PC User desktop-client data directories for Google Drive/DriveFS, Dropbox, OneDrive, and iCloud/Apple are recorded absent.
claim.interpretation: This is local artifact availability context for the captured PC User profile. The inventory does not itself establish use, transfer direction, upload completion, or human identity.
